source_input.title: In the Forest
source_input.content: A grandfather tells Uthman how a tyrannical lion is humbled by a mosquito and learns that strength must serve justice.

input.title: In the Forest
input.content: A grandfather tells Uthman how a tyrannical lion is humbled by a mosquito and learns that strength must serve justice.

source_context.cultural_context_en: An Islamic moral tale framed by a grandfather speaking with his grandson around Eid.
cultural_invariants_en: Allah alone is greater than every creature.
Strength is a trust and never a license to oppress the weak.
The Eid setting and family storytelling frame remain respectful.
